title: Adadaa Adadaa Adada Lyrics Santhosh Subramaniam
stanzas:
Adadaa Adadaa Adada Song Lyrics Santhosh Subramaniam
#DSP #Siddharth #NaMuthukumar

Adadaa adadaa adadaa
enai yedho seigiraai
Adadaa adadaa adadaa
en nenjai koigiraai

kanavil neeyum vandhaal
en urakkam kaetkiraai
edhiril neeyum vandhaal
en uyirai kaetkiraai

adi un mugam kandaal
en imai rendum
kaigal thattudhe..

Adadaa adadaa adadaa
enai yedho seigiraai
Adadaa adadaa adadaa
en nenjai koigiraai

neeyum naanum
ondraai pogum podhu
neelum paadhai innum
vendum endru
nenjam yaengudhadi.

vaanavillaai
neeyum vandha podhu
en karuppu vellai
kangal rendum
coloraai maarudhadi.

en veettu poovellaam
un veettu dhisai paarkum
en vaasam un padham
engaenu ketkudhadi.

Adadaa adadaa adadaa
enai yedho seigiraai
Adadaa adadaa adadaa
en nenjai koigiraai

ye vaanam meedhu
odum megamellaam
unadhu uruvam pola
vadivam kaatta
kangal mayangudhadi..

poovilaadum
pattaampoochi kooda
neeyum nadandhu kondae
parandhu sellum
azhagai rasikkudhu

un seigai ovvondrum
en kadhal arthangal
naalthorum naan serkkum
niyabaga chinnangal

Adadaa adadaa adadaa
enai yedho seigiraai
Adadaa adadaa adadaa
en nenjai koigiraai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for Adadaa Adadaa?

The music was composed by the talented Devi Sri Prasad.

Which movie features the song Adadaa Adadaa?

The song is from the Tamil movie Santhosh Subramaniam.

Who are the lead actors in Santhosh Subramaniam?

The movie stars Jayam Ravi and Genelia D'Souza in lead roles.

What is the theme of the song Adadaa Adadaa?

The song portrays the joyous and romantic emotions of love.

When was the movie Santhosh Subramaniam released?

The movie was released in the year 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adadaa Adadaa from the movie Santhosh Subramaniam, released in 2008, is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and joy. Featuring the lead pair Jayam Ravi and Genelia D'Souza, the song showcases their delightful on-screen chemistry. Composed by Devi Sri Prasad and written by Na Muthukumar, the lyrics and music blend seamlessly to evoke a sense of happiness and affection. Siddharth's soulful rendition adds depth to this enchanting track, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adadaa Adadaa from the movie Santhosh Subramaniam is a delightful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and joy. Composed by the talented Devi Sri Prasad and penned by Na Muthukumar, this song features the soulful vocals of Siddharth. The vibrant chemistry between Jayam Ravi and Genelia D'Souza adds a magical touch to this memorable track.
stanzaMeanings: Adadaa Adadaa Adada Song Lyrics Santhosh Subramaniam #DSP #Siddharth #NaMuthukumar
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're doing something to me. Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're captivating my heart.
When you appear in my dreams, you disturb my sleep. When you appear in front of me, you captivate my soul.
Oh, when I see your face, my eyelids clap like hands.
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're doing something to me. Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're captivating my heart.
When you and I walk together as one, my heart longs for the journey to continue endlessly.
When you appear like a rainbow, my black and white eyes turn colorful.
The flowers in my house look towards the direction of your house. My fragrance asks where your feet are.
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're doing something to me. Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're captivating my heart.
The clouds running above in the sky resemble your form, mesmerizing my eyes.
Even the butterfly dancing among flowers admires your beauty as it walks and flies.
Every action of yours adds meaning to my love, creating memories I cherish daily.
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're doing something to me. Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, you're captivating my heart.
